title: pkg/supplemented test: replace our null blobinfocache
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind cleanup

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

In our tests, drop our own doesn't-do-anything BlobInfoCache implementation, and just use the one provided by the image library.

#### How to verify it

Tests should continue to pass.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```
None
```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *nalind* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [nalind] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Although it's claiming it's needing a rebase, not sure the merge will happen.
I haven’t really followed this code and I have no idea about the motivation — just for the record, `c/image/pkg/blobinfocache/none.NoCache` exists.
… and of course that’s what this PR does use. I’m sorry.
